summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Multi-Timeframe Technical Analysis Engine. All 6 timeframes (4H, 1D, 7D, 30D, 180D, 1Y) generate unique technical analysis data as required.
passed_tests: MTF API returns data for all 6 timeframes
Each TF has unique candle counts (200, 150, 65, 42, 12, 11)
Each TF has unique swing points and structure patterns
Each TF has unique levels (different price sets)
4H shows uptrend, 1D shows downtrend as expected
180D and 1Y show full BTC cycle range ($15K -> $126K)
Frontend correctly loads and displays MTF data
Console logs confirm unique data per timeframe

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (9/10 tests passed - minor UI interaction issues but core functionality works)
